title: Art of War
description: If you do not play any Attacks during your turn, gain 1 additional energy next turn.
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: Energy is only granted starting from round 2 onwards. The relic tracks whether any Attacks were played during your turn and grants energy at the start of the next turn only if no attacks were played the previous turn.
